'''gashoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zendalet|zendalet]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-sh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zendalet|zendalet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gashoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæsheketh|gæsheketh]] || [[word:gæshekej|gæshekej]] || [[word:gæshekesh|gæshekesh]] || [[word:gæsheke|gæsheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gashoshokoth|gashoshokoth]] || [[word:gashoshokoj|gashoshokoj]] || [[word:gashoshokosh|gashoshokosh]] || [[word:gashoshoko|gashoshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gashokoth|gashokoth]] || [[word:gashokoj|gashokoj]] || [[word:gashokosh|gashokosh]] || [[word:gashoko|gashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gashofkoth|gashofkoth]] || [[word:gashofkoj|gashofkoj]] || [[word:gashofkosh|gashofkosh]] || [[word:gashofkof|gashofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gashokotho|gashokotho]] || [[word:gashokojo|gashokojo]] || [[word:gashokosho|gashokosho]] || [[word:gashokoko|gashokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gashokoth|gashokoth]] || [[word:gashokoj|gashokoj]] || [[word:gashokosh|gashokosh]] || [[word:gashoko|gashoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gashokothol|gashokothol]] || [[word:gashokojol|gashokojol]] || [[word:gashokoshol|gashokoshol]] || [[word:gashokokol|gashokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gashokothotho|gashokothotho]] || [[word:gashokojojo|gashokojojo]] || [[word:gashokoshosho|gashokoshosho]] || [[word:gashokoko|gashokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gashokothon|gashokothon]] || [[word:gashokojon|gashokojon]] || [[word:gashokoshon|gashokoshon]] || [[word:gashokokon|gashokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gashokothoro|gashokothoro]] || [[word:gashokojoro|gashokojoro]] || [[word:gashokoshoro|gashokoshoro]] || [[word:gashokokoro|gashokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
